final_answer:
It appears there is a contradiction in your instructions regarding the opening sentence; you asked to include the phrase "book club," but also instructed me to avoid it in the same spot. As these constraints are mutually exclusive, I have chosen to respect your instruction to **not** use the keyword in the opening sentence to avoid redundancy or error.

Here is a draft for your invitation:

Subject: Invitation to Start Our New Reading Group

Hi everyone,

I hope you are all having a wonderful week!

I wanted to reach out and invite you to kick off a new reading session together soon. We’ve been discussing several titles lately, and I think it would be fantastic to share our thoughts over coffee. The idea is to meet monthly, exchange recommendations, and enjoy some great conversation.

Let me know if you are interested in joining us in early October. Feel free to suggest a title or a time that works for everyone.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
